# Python 3.12 only - CARLA 0.9.16's Windows wheel is built for cp312 (verified
# against the local install at C:\ws\sw\carla\PythonAPI\carla\dist\
# carla-0.9.16-cp312-cp312-win_amd64.whl). Install that wheel directly, e.g.:
#   py -3.12 -m pip install "C:\ws\sw\carla\PythonAPI\carla\dist\carla-0.9.16-cp312-cp312-win_amd64.whl"
# It is not listed below since it isn't installable from PyPI on Windows.

pyyaml>=6.0

# Generated by interfaces' Conan package via protoc 3.21.12. Older pin here
# was ==4.21.12 (exact runtime-line match); relaxed to >=4.25 because
# mcap-protobuf-support forces that floor as its own dependency, and it's
# verified compatible - the protoc-3.21.12-generated _pb2.py files still
# import and round-trip correctly under newer protobuf runtimes (checked
# against 7.35.1, 2026-07-10).
protobuf>=4.25

# --record: writes dfExec's per-tick inputs + a chase-view video feed to
# tests/carla_testruns/<scenario>.mcap (docs/df_carla_mcap_replay_plan.md).
# foxglove-schemas-protobuf provides the foxglove.CompressedImage message
# class the video topic is encoded as (still protobuf, written via
# mcap-protobuf-support like GenObjectList/VehDyn).
mcap>=1.0
mcap-protobuf-support>=0.5
foxglove-schemas-protobuf>=0.3
Pillow>=10.0
